title: Small Test Pruning Option
option: If full 183 removal is considered too aggressive, test with 25 lowest-value URLs first.

test_urls_25.selection_criteria: 0 impressions in 90 days, lowest unique value score, least internal links, no money-page support
test_urls_25.note: Full 25-URL list would be generated at execution time from the 183 candidate pool, sorted by lowest value.

rollback_plan: Remove 25-URL exclusion from sitemap.ts filter, redeploy. Pages re-enter sitemap within ~100 seconds.
success_criteria: No traffic loss on any money page
No Google penalty or ranking drop on remaining pages
recommendation: SKIP_TEST — full 183 removal is equally reversible and provides clearer signal. A 25-URL test adds a week of waiting for no additional safety benefit.
